// why this file: Compiles the pure dashboard lib (heroMath + labels) + node:test suites.
rootDir is the app workspace root (../..) because heroMath value-imports
src/lib/dates and labels value-imports src/lib/logger, so the emitted
tree mirrors app/ under dist-test/ (tests live at
package.json has no type:module) keeps the extensionless relative imports
valid for both Metro and the compiled node run. The shared logger import
resolves at runtime through the package's `default` export condition
